3157420.name: Wild Haven
3157420.description:
Wild Haven is a relaxing nature builder where you bring life back to a ruined world. Explore the world around you, clean up the pollution left behind, bring back plants and animals, and grow your woodland forest. Unlock your full potential by helping ancient spirits and selecting upgrades to build a vibrant ecosystem.

Build complex ecosystems

Build your forest and discover unique and varied wildlife.  Strategically place wildlife on the map to act as resources for other kinds of plants and animals.  As you build more, you’ll be able to add more resource intensive plants and animals. Upgrade your own abilities to discover new and interesting wildlife and see what kind of forest you can build.

From Shrine to Sanctuary

You begin with nothing but a small shrine in a polluted wasteland. By cleaning the land and inviting nature back, you generate the energy needed to push back the pollution. As you play, the map physically expands, unlocking new areas to restore and giving you more ways to build your forest.

A Short, Hand-Crafted Journey

Wild Haven is designed to be a short experience that can be completed in an afternoon. Whether you follow the story to uncover the history of the spirits or go your own way and focus on just building, you can restore the entire world in a single, satisfying session.

Features

  • Relaxing Gameplay: No combat, no fail states instead just focus on growth.

  • Incremental Growth: Watch your forest expand from a small shrine to a sprawling world.

  • Synergy Strategy: Optimize your placement of plants and animals to build complex ecosystems.

  • Story of the Forest: Uncover the history of the spirits and the ruin through a hand crafted story.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
